signatureMove.name: Lose Control
signatureMove.endStepEffect: If this character was not slain then it is Removed from Play and replaced with Striga Anya. Striga Anya gains energy and suffers Wds equal to those already on this character along with all Moonstones it's carrying and any stat modifications or abilities it has gained. If this character was the active character, continue the current activation with Striga Anya; it may not Jog if Anya Bartol already did this turn.

abilities.name: Weakling
abilities.description: Reduce all Melee Dmg this character deals by -1. Harvest actions cost this model +1 energy.

abilities.name: Look of Innocence
abilities.description: When an enemy targets this character with an action, the active enemy model must discard 1 energy or the action is cancelled.

abilities.name: Swift
abilities.description: When making a Reaction Step while engaged by an enemy, this model may move 2" instead of the usual 1".

abilities.name: Remove Necklace
abilities.description: When played, this character gains +4 energy. Then it is Removed from Play and replaced with Striga Anya. Striga Anya gains energy and suffers Wds equal to those already on this character along with all Moonstones and any abilities it has gained. Continue Striga Anya's activation with the same turn.
